title: Web status dashboard (FastAPI + HTMX)
description: Lightweight web dashboard that proxies the node's CoAP resources into a browser UI. FastAPI server makes CoAP requests to a local node and renders status/neighbors/presence/messages. Single-file Python app with embedded HTML template using HTMX for auto-refresh.
close_reason: lichen-dashboard FastAPI+HTMX app implemented with 15 passing tests; lichen-dashboard entry point added to pyproject.toml
